'''Lady Greelanx''' was the wife of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Winstel Greelanx]]. She was disliked by the admiral, who had two mistresses. The two of them had two grown children, a son and a daughter and had a grandchild on the way in [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]]. She was widowed when Winstel died at the hands of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{1stm}}
